sent_simp: 他鼓动大家一起去爬山。
sent_trad: 他鼓動大家一起去爬山。
pinyin: Tā gǔ dòng dà jiā yī qǐ qù pá shān.
english: He encouraged everyone to go hiking together.

sent_simp: 我的鼠标坏了，需要换一个。
sent_trad: 我的鼠標壞了，需要換一個。
pinyin: Wǒ de shǔ biāo huài le, xū yào huàn yī gè.
english: My mouse is broken and I need to replace it.

sent_simp: 他一头扎进书堆里复习。
sent_trad: 他一頭扎進書堆裡複習。
pinyin: Tā yī tóu zhā jìn shū duī lǐ fù xí.
english: He buried himself headlong in a pile of books to review.

sent_simp: 一路上他们聊得很开心。
sent_trad: 一路上他們聊得很開心。
pinyin: Yī lù shàng tā men liáo de hěn kāi xīn.
english: Along the way, they chatted happily.

sent_simp: 床的上方挂着一盏灯。
sent_trad: 床的上方掛著一盞燈。
pinyin: Chuáng de shàng fāng guà zhe yī zhǎn dēng.
english: A lamp is hanging above the bed.

sent_simp: 他下岗后开了一家小餐馆。
sent_trad: 他下崗後開了一家小餐館。
pinyin: Tā xià gǎng hòu kāi le yī jiā xiǎo cān guǎn.
english: After being laid off, he opened a small restaurant.

sent_simp: 下期杂志会有更多新内容。
sent_trad: 下期雜誌會有更多新內容。
pinyin: Xià qī zá zhì huì yǒu gèng duō xīn nèi róng.
english: The next issue of the magazine will have more new content.

sent_simp: 学语言不仅仅是背单词。
sent_trad: 學語言不僅僅是背單詞。
pinyin: Xué yǔ yán bù jǐn jǐn shì bèi dān cí.
english: Learning a language is not just about memorizing vocabulary.

sent_simp: 这点小事不算什么，别担心。
sent_trad: 這點小事不算什麼，別擔心。
pinyin: Zhè diǎn xiǎo shì bù suàn shén me, bié dān xīn.
english: This little thing doesn't count for much, don't worry about it.

sent_simp: 他两手提着沉重的购物袋。
sent_trad: 他兩手提著沉重的購物袋。
pinyin: Tā liǎng shǒu tí zhe chén zhòng de gòu wù dài.
english: He was carrying heavy shopping bags in both hands.

sent_simp: 这部电视剧的主题歌很好听。
sent_trad: 這部電視劇的主題歌很好聽。
pinyin: Zhè bù diàn shì jù de zhǔ tí gē hěn hǎo tīng.
english: The theme song of this TV drama is really nice.

sent_simp: 去也好，不去也好，随你。
sent_trad: 去也好，不去也好，隨你。
pinyin: Qù yě hǎo, bù qù yě hǎo, suí nǐ.
english: Whether you go or not is fine, it's up to you.

sent_simp: 你记得去交费，别让电话停了。
sent_trad: 你記得去交費，別讓電話停了。
pinyin: Nǐ jì de qù jiāo fèi, bié ràng diàn huà tíng le.
english: Remember to pay the bill so your phone doesn't get cut off.

sent_simp: 这种苹果的产地是新疆。
sent_trad: 這種蘋果的產地是新疆。
pinyin: Zhè zhǒng píng guǒ de chǎn dì shì Xīn jiāng.
english: The place of origin for this type of apple is Xinjiang.

sent_simp: 公共场所不能大声喧哗。
sent_trad: 公共場所不能大聲喧嘩。
pinyin: Gōng gòng chǎng suǒ bù néng dà shēng xuān huá.
english: You shouldn't make loud noise in public places.

sent_simp: 他写了一封公开信说明情况。
sent_trad: 他寫了一封公開信說明情況。
pinyin: Tā xiě le yī fēng gōng kāi xìn shuō míng qíng kuàng.
english: He wrote an open letter to explain the situation.

sent_simp: 名单已在网上公示，请自行查看。
sent_trad: 名單已在網上公示，請自行查看。
pinyin: Míng dān yǐ zài wǎng shàng gōng shì, qǐng zì xíng chá kàn.
english: The list has been made public online; please check it yourself.

sent_simp: 买房时可以用公积金贷款。
sent_trad: 買房時可以用公積金貸款。
pinyin: Mǎi fáng shí kě yǐ yòng gōng jī jīn dài kuǎn.
english: You can use your housing fund to get a loan when buying a home.

sent_simp: 很多农民工在城市里打工赚钱。
sent_trad: 很多農民工在城市裡打工賺錢。
pinyin: Hěn duō nóng mín gōng zài chéng shì lǐ dǎ gōng zuàn qián.
english: Many migrant workers earn money by working in cities.

sent_simp: 他凭着努力考上了大学。
sent_trad: 他憑著努力考上了大學。
pinyin: Tā píng zhe nǔ lì kǎo shàng le dà xué.
english: He got into university by relying on hard work.

sent_simp: 市长出访期间由副市长主持工作。
sent_trad: 市長出訪期間由副市長主持工作。
pinyin: Shì zhǎng chū fǎng qī jiān yóu fù shì zhǎng zhǔ chí gōng zuò.
english: While the mayor is away on an official visit, the deputy mayor takes charge.

sent_simp: 别说跑步了，他连走路都费力。
sent_trad: 別說跑步了，他連走路都費力。
pinyin: Bié shuō pǎo bù le, tā lián zǒu lù dōu fèi lì.
english: Not to mention running — he even struggles to walk.

sent_simp: 这所学校办学多年，口碑很好。
sent_trad: 這所學校辦學多年，口碑很好。
pinyin: Zhè suǒ xué xiào bàn xué duō nián, kǒu bēi hěn hǎo.
english: This school has been running for many years and has an excellent reputation.

sent_simp: 他通过提供劳务来赚取收入。
sent_trad: 他通過提供勞務來賺取收入。
pinyin: Tā tōng guò tí gōng láo wù lái zuàn qǔ shōu rù.
english: He earns income by providing labor services.

sent_simp: 这件衬衫是化纤的，不太透气。
sent_trad: 這件襯衫是化纖的，不太透氣。
pinyin: Zhè jiàn chèn shān shì huà xiān de, bù tài tòu qì.
english: This shirt is made of synthetic fiber and isn't very breathable.

sent_simp: 他是历届毕业生中成绩最好的。
sent_trad: 他是歷屆畢業生中成績最好的。
pinyin: Tā shì lì jiè bì yè shēng zhōng chéng jì zuì hǎo de.
english: He is the highest-achieving graduate across all previous classes.

sent_simp: 结果取决于你的努力程度。
sent_trad: 結果取決於你的努力程度。
pinyin: Jié guǒ qǔ jué yú nǐ de nǔ lì chéng dù.
english: The outcome depends on how hard you work.

sent_simp: 他替朋友受过，被老板骂了一顿。
sent_trad: 他替朋友受過，被老闆罵了一頓。
pinyin: Tā tì péng yǒu shòu guò, bèi lǎo bǎn mà le yī dùn.
english: He took the blame for his friend and got scolded by the boss.

sent_simp: 打开门，只见他站在门口。
sent_trad: 打開門，只見他站在門口。
pinyin: Dǎ kāi mén, zhǐ jiàn tā zhàn zài mén kǒu.
english: Opening the door, I was surprised to find him standing at the entrance.

sent_simp: 司长亲自出席了这次会议。
sent_trad: 司長親自出席了這次會議。
pinyin: Sī zhǎng qīn zì chū xí le zhè cì huì yì.
english: The bureau chief attended this meeting in person.

sent_simp: 妈妈总是向着弟弟，让我很委屈。
sent_trad: 媽媽總是向著弟弟，讓我很委屈。
pinyin: Māma zǒng shì xiàng zhe dì di, ràng wǒ hěn wěi qū.
english: Mom always takes my younger brother's side, which makes me feel wronged.

sent_simp: 那只大狗的叫声真吓人。
sent_trad: 那隻大狗的叫聲真嚇人。
pinyin: Nà zhī dà gǒu de jiào shēng zhēn xià rén.
english: The barking of that big dog is really scary.

sent_simp: 上课铃响起，同学们跑进教室。
sent_trad: 上課鈴響起，同學們跑進教室。
pinyin: Shàng kè líng xiǎng qǐ, tóng xué men pǎo jìn jiào shì.
english: When the class bell rang out, the students ran into the classroom.

sent_simp: 周末我喜欢在家休息。
sent_trad: 週末我喜歡在家休息。
pinyin: Zhōu mò wǒ xǐ huān zài jiā xiū xi.
english: On weekends I like to rest at home.

sent_simp: 这个场馆可以容纳上万名观众。
sent_trad: 這個場館可以容納上萬名觀眾。
pinyin: Zhè ge chǎng guǎn kě yǐ róng nà shàng wàn míng guān zhòng.
english: This venue can accommodate tens of thousands of spectators.

sent_simp: 农民通过种植新品种来增收。
sent_trad: 農民通過種植新品種來增收。
pinyin: Nóng mín tōng guò zhòng zhí xīn pǐn zhǒng lái zēng shōu.
english: Farmers increase their income by growing new crop varieties.

sent_simp: 他们多年没见，一见面就聊个不停。
sent_trad: 他們多年沒見，一見面就聊個不停。
pinyin: Tā men duō nián méi jiàn, yī jiàn miàn jiù liáo ge bù tíng.
english: They hadn't seen each other for many years and couldn't stop talking once they met.

sent_simp: 她在钢琴大奖赛中获得了第一名。
sent_trad: 她在鋼琴大獎賽中獲得了第一名。
pinyin: Tā zài gāng qín dà jiǎng sài zhōng huò dé le dì yī míng.
english: She won first place in the piano grand prix.

sent_simp: 他们家是个大家庭，每周末聚在一起吃饭。
sent_trad: 他們家是個大家庭，每週末聚在一起吃飯。
pinyin: Tā men jiā shì ge dà jiā tíng, měi zhōu mò jù zài yī qǐ chī fàn.
english: Their family is a big extended family that gathers every weekend for a meal.

sent_simp: 他花了大笔钱买了一辆新车。
sent_trad: 他花了大筆錢買了一輛新車。
pinyin: Tā huā le dà bǐ qián mǎi le yī liàng xīn chē.
english: He spent a large sum of money to buy a new car.
